```{=html}
<div style="width:92%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.4em 1.05em;border-radius:18px;">

 <!-- 4 x 2 uniform card grid -->
 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr;gap:0.7em;align-items:stretch;">

  <!-- /think (purple) -->
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #E3DCD2;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.55em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(44,62,80,0.08);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;">
   <div style="width:2.1em;height:2.1em;border-radius:0.55em;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#5654A2;"><i data-lucide="lightbulb" style="width:1.05em;height:1.05em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.56em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;line-height:1.2;">/think</code>
   <div style="font-size:0.44em;color:#564232;line-height:1.3;white-space:nowrap;">Plan before coding</div>
  </div>

  <!-- /ui (blue) -->
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #E3DCD2;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.55em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(44,62,80,0.08);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;">
   <div style="width:2.1em;height:2.1em;border-radius:0.55em;background:#DCE9FA;border:1px solid #A6C4EA;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#3A7DC9;"><i data-lucide="layout-panel-top" style="width:1.05em;height:1.05em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.56em;font-weight:700;color:#3A7DC9;line-height:1.2;">/ui</code>
   <div style="font-size:0.44em;color:#564232;line-height:1.3;white-space:nowrap;">Craft the frontend</div>
  </div>

  <!-- /hunt (teal) -->
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #E3DCD2;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.55em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(44,62,80,0.08);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;">
   <div style="width:2.1em;height:2.1em;border-radius:0.55em;background:#E5F2EE;border:1px solid #BCDFC0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;"><i data-lucide="bug" style="width:1.05em;height:1.05em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.56em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;line-height:1.2;">/hunt</code>
   <div style="font-size:0.44em;color:#564232;line-height:1.3;white-space:nowrap;">Find root causes</div>
  </div>

  <!-- /check (sage) -->
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #E3DCD2;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.55em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(44,62,80,0.08);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;">
   <div style="width:2.1em;height:2.1em;border-radius:0.55em;background:#E9F1EB;border:1px solid #C6DBCB;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#4A7A5A;"><i data-lucide="clipboard-check" style="width:1.05em;height:1.05em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.56em;font-weight:700;color:#4A7A5A;line-height:1.2;">/check</code>
   <div style="font-size:0.44em;color:#564232;line-height:1.3;white-space:nowrap;">Review &amp; ship</div>
  </div>

  <!-- /write (purple-bright) -->
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #E3DCD2;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.55em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(44,62,80,0.08);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;">
   <div style="width:2.1em;height:2.1em;border-radius:0.55em;background:#F3E5F5;border:1px solid #D3A8DB;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#7B2CBF;"><i data-lucide="pen-line" style="width:1.05em;height:1.05em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.56em;font-weight:700;color:#7B2CBF;line-height:1.2;">/write</code>
   <div style="font-size:0.44em;color:#564232;line-height:1.3;white-space:nowrap;">Polish your prose</div>
  </div>

  <!-- /read (amber) -->
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #E3DCD2;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.55em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(44,62,80,0.08);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;">
   <div style="width:2.1em;height:2.1em;border-radius:0.55em;background:#FEF5E7;border:1px solid #F0DDB4;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#C4881A;"><i data-lucide="book-open" style="width:1.05em;height:1.05em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.56em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;line-height:1.2;">/read</code>
   <div style="font-size:0.44em;color:#564232;line-height:1.3;white-space:nowrap;">Digest URLs &amp; PDFs</div>
  </div>

  <!-- /learn (navy) -->
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #E3DCD2;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.55em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(44,62,80,0.08);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;">
   <div style="width:2.1em;height:2.1em;border-radius:0.55em;background:#E8ECF0;border:1px solid #C5CED8;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C3E50;"><i data-lucide="graduation-cap" style="width:1.05em;height:1.05em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.56em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.2;">/learn</code>
   <div style="font-size:0.44em;color:#564232;line-height:1.3;white-space:nowrap;">Research a domain</div>
  </div>

  <!-- /health (coral) -->
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #E3DCD2;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.55em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(44,62,80,0.08);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;">
   <div style="width:2.1em;height:2.1em;border-radius:0.55em;background:#FCEEEC;border:1px solid #F0C5BA;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#D45F47;"><i data-lucide="activity" style="width:1.05em;height:1.05em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.56em;font-weight:700;color:#D45F47;line-height:1.2;">/health</code>
   <div style="font-size:0.44em;color:#564232;line-height:1.3;white-space:nowrap;">Audit your setup</div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
